role: The right-rail region that displays details and actions for the currently selected canvas node.
capabilities: Show selected node identity (nodeType, kind, nodeId, address)
Render served status badge colored by registry token
Force re-run selected node bypassing memo cache
Edit node config through generic NodeConfigForm
Display node output in a Surface well
Surface output as an inbox decision
Build a new node from the output
substance_why: The file fully implements the inspector region with real data bindings, status/freshness rendering, config editing, output display, and four wired action buttons.
interactions_present: Click '↻ force' to rerun the selected node
Click '↻ rerun' from the output footer
Click 'open workshop ⤢' to load output into workshop
Click '→ inbox' to surface output as a decision
Click '⊕ build from output' to seed a new node
Edit config fields via NodeConfigForm onSet
interactions_missing: No in-file trigger for freshness derivation (only consumes existing state)
No copy-to-clipboard for node-id or address
No confirmation before force rerun or build
No keyboard shortcuts or focus management
No loading/error state for config saves
No rich output rendering beyond a plain <pre>
performance_risks: Costly on-demand freshness derivation (recompile + input-hash + memo_sig compare) can be triggered repeatedly on selection changes
configTick key forces a full remount of NodeConfigForm after each write, losing focus and adding render cost
Large outputs are rendered verbatim inside <pre> without virtualization or truncation
statusStyle object is recreated every render
reuse_why: The component preserves the required inspector concepts, data-ui-refs, and registry-driven status logic, but its monolithic mix of identity, status, config, output, and actions needs restructuring.
decomposition_hints: Split the identity/status/freshness header into its own component
Split the config section (NodeConfigForm wrapper + error boundary + configTick remount logic) into its own component
Split the output display and action footer into its own component
Extract empty state into a reusable component
Separate status/freshness presentation helpers from layout markup
